# Iconoir

- Upstream: https://github.com/iconoir-icons/iconoir
- Site: https://iconoir.com/
- License: MIT (see `LICENSE`)
- Acquired: 2026-04-21 via `git clone --depth 1`
- Layout: `icons/regular/` and `icons/solid/`

## Count

- Total icons: **1671**
  - `regular/`: 1383 (outline style)
  - `solid/`: 288 (filled style, subset)
- Size on disk: ~6.5 MB

## Sample filenames (regular)

```
accessibility.svg
accessibility-sign.svg
activity.svg
adobe-after-effects.svg
adobe-illustrator.svg
airplane.svg
airplane-helix.svg
alarm.svg
align-bottom-box.svg
apple-wallet.svg
archive.svg
bell.svg
bookmark.svg
calendar.svg
camera.svg
chat-bubble.svg
check.svg
clipboard.svg
cloud.svg
code.svg
```

## Sample filenames (solid)

```
activity.svg
alarm.svg
bookmark.svg
calendar.svg
camera.svg
cloud.svg
heart.svg
lightbulb.svg
star.svg
user.svg
```

## Notes

- Visual character: 24x24 grid, 1.5px rounded stroke, geometric-organic balance.
- Solid set is curated, not 1:1 with regular.
- Naming is kebab-case, descriptive; no suffix for style (folder handles that).
